name: public_message_notify

metadata.description: Notification email sent to admins when a public (contact/support) message is submitted through the bouncer.
notes: Sent to every User flagged with metadata.protected.notify_public_messages=True.
Group-scoped messages only notify members of that group.
Subject is overridden at call time via PUBLIC_MESSAGE_NOTIFY_SUBJECT setting.

html_template:
New {{ message.kind }} message

From: {{ message.name }} <{{ message.email }}>
{% if group_name %}Group: {{ group_name }}
{% endif %} {% if message.metadata.company %}Company: {{ message.metadata.company }}
{% endif %} {% if message.metadata.category %}Category: {{ message.metadata.category }}
{% endif %} {% if message.metadata.severity %}Severity: {{ message.metadata.severity }}
{% endif %}

{{ message.message }}

Message ID: {{ message.id }} • {{ message.created }}
